Send Email.description: Compose and dispatch a new email message from your Gmail account.

Reply to Email.description: Send a reply on an existing email thread.

Create Draft.description: Save a draft email without sending it.

Create Draft Reply.description: Save a draft reply on an existing email thread.

Archive Email.description: Move an email out of the inbox into the archive.

Delete Email.description: Move an email message to the trash.

Add Label to Email.description: Apply an existing label to a specific email message.

Remove Label From Email.description: Remove a label from a specific email message.

Remove Label From Conversation.description: Remove a label from every email in a conversation thread.

Create Label.description: Define a new label that can later be applied to messages.

Find Email.description: Locate one or more email messages that match a Gmail search query.

Get Attachment by Filename.description: Pull a specific Gmail attachment by its filename.
